chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-317 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 20-02-2025 None present for the applicants. **** None present for the applicants; no intimation is received so far. However, perusal of impugned order dated 04.06.2024, reflects that on the basis of police reports submitted by DSP Complaint Cell Khairpur and SHO, P.S, Khuhra supporting the versions of respondent No.4 and MLC of injured, learned Additional Sessions Judge/Justice of Peace, Gambat has passed the impugned order, which appears to have been passed on cogent reasons and no case for any interference of this Court is made out. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed in limine along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Ahmad
